evidenceRequirementGaps.message: Attestation independent-rollout-verification-forage.governance.forage.governance.attestation.evidence has no authority source for veritas plus authority attestation.
Attestation independent-rollout-verification-forage.governance.forage.governance.attestation.evidence has no identity evidenceCheck reference.

strengthenEvidence.message: Attestation independent-rollout-verification-forage.governance.forage.governance.attestation.evidence has no authority source for veritas plus authority attestation.
Attestation independent-rollout-verification-forage.governance.forage.governance.attestation.evidence has no identity evidenceCheck reference.

evidence.excerptOrSummary: Veritas marked delivery.workflows as an affected work area for Initial Project Setup.
Veritas marked governance.guidance as an affected work area for Initial Project Setup.

commandOutput.stdout:
> @kontourai/forage@0.4.1 verify
> npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:release-tag-ancestry


> @kontourai/forage@0.4.1 typecheck
> tsc --noEmit


> @kontourai/forage@0.4.1 test
> npm run build && node --test dist/tests/*.test.js


> @kontourai/forage@0.4.1 build
> rm -rf dist && tsc
